name: Hank 24x24 Garage Plan - A Rustic Garage + Spacious Porch for Work, Storage & Relaxation
open_features: A flexible square footprint with plenty of interior room for vehicles, tools, or workshop equipment - paired with a shaded porch perfect for seating, storage overflow, or outdoor relaxation.
Clean framing, simple geometry, and detailed plans make this design accessible for both first-time builders and experienced craftspeople.
Classic farmhouse-inspired double doors with upper window grids add charm while providing wide, practical access for cars, ATVs, mowers, or large equipment.
Vertical wood siding, crisp white trim, lantern-style lighting, and stone-look lower paneling create a rich, inviting aesthetic with high-end visual appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Hank Garage Plan - a 24x24 classic garage and covered porch design crafted for efficiency, comfort, and timeless rural charm. With its steep gable roof, warm vertical wood siding, oversized dual garage doors, and a generous wrap-style porch, the Hank delivers refined farmhouse character with practical everyday functionality. Whether you're building a home workshop, garden supply hub, project studio, or well-organized vehicle storage, the Hank 24x2...
